description: v11 reboot smoke (axis E, post-park): on top of shrunk v6 anchor (n_est=1000, family-best 48772.08), add a property_type x commune_first interaction feature (paired categorical / cross encoding). Hypothesis: price-per-type varies sharply by commune and an explicit cross may shortcut what the booster infers across many trees. Strip the parked velocity features. Single-knob feature addition vs the bare shrunk anchor.
